blended.narrative: Boyne Highlands is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
